title: Anthropic Academy — Build with Claude
description: Official Anthropic learning hub: courses and guides for building with Claude, prompt engineering, the API, and agentic apps — plus Claude skill credentials.

title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
description: The industry-standard cloud architecture certification — design resilient, cost-optimized systems on AWS. One of the most recognized certs in tech.

title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
description: The best entry point to cloud — foundational AWS knowledge with no deep technical prerequisites. Ideal first certification for freshers.

title: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty
description: Validate the ability to build, train, tune and deploy ML models on AWS. A strong signal for aspiring ML engineers.

title: Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
description: Design and manage robust, secure, scalable cloud architecture on Google Cloud — consistently rated among the highest-value IT certifications.

title: Google Cloud Digital Leader
description: Foundational Google Cloud certification covering cloud concepts and Google Cloud products — approachable for beginners and non-engineers.

title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
description: A career-launching, beginner-friendly path into data analytics — spreadsheets, SQL, R, and Tableau. Free to audit; certificate optional.

title: Meta Front-End Developer Professional Certificate
description: Meta's job-ready front-end program: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and version control. Free to audit; certificate optional.

title: Meta Back-End Developer Professional Certificate
description: Meta's back-end program: Python, Django, APIs and databases — built to be job-ready. Free to audit; certificate optional.

title: Machine Learning Specialization (Andrew Ng)
description: The classic, beginner-friendly introduction to modern machine learning by Andrew Ng — the most popular ML course in the world.

title: Deep Learning Specialization (Andrew Ng)
description: Go from the fundamentals of neural networks to CNNs, sequence models and transformers. The definitive deep-learning course series.

title: CS50: Introduction to Computer Science (Harvard)
description: Harvard's legendary, completely free introduction to computer science — C, Python, SQL, algorithms and web. A rite of passage for beginners.

title: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
description: The hands-on, performance-based certification for running Kubernetes in production — highly valued for DevOps and platform roles.

title: HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate
description: Validate infrastructure-as-code skills with Terraform — a core DevOps/cloud skill across every major cloud.

title: TensorFlow Developer Certificate
description: Demonstrate you can build and train deep-learning models with TensorFlow — a practical, project-based ML credential.

title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
description: A hands-on path into data science — Python, SQL, data analysis, visualization and machine learning. Free to audit; certificate optional.

title: GitHub Foundations Certification
description: Official GitHub certification covering collaboration, repositories, and the fundamentals every developer uses daily.

title: freeCodeCamp — Responsive Web Design Certification
description: A completely free, project-based certification in HTML and CSS — build real, responsive pages from scratch.

title: freeCodeCamp — JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures
description: Free, hands-on JavaScript certification covering fundamentals, algorithms and data structures — essential interview prep.

title: NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI)
description: Hands-on, GPU-accelerated training in AI, deep learning, data science and accelerated computing — with DLI certificates of competency.
